title: T-008 — SET-005 First Product Redirect Step (skippable)
prompt:
Implement SET-005 First Product Step page at `/onboarding/4` per PRD §14.3 step 4 + §14.4 SET-005. This is a soft-redirect step: the page presents two CTAs — `Create Product` (links to 03-TECHNICAL create-product flow with `?onboarding=true&return=/onboarding/5`) and `Skip` (calls T-003 skipOnboardingStep(orgId, 4) then router.push('/onboarding/5')).

Returning from 03-TECHNICAL with `?onboardingComplete=true` triggers updateOnboardingState({current_step:5, completed_steps:[...,4]}) then advances.

RED: `pnpm --filter web test -- onboarding-step4`.

pipeline_inputs.description: Soft-redirect page with Create-Product CTA + Skip; returns via query param.
pipeline_inputs.details: Skip button is REQUIRED here per PRD §14.3 step 4. Return-from-3-TECHNICAL handling reads searchParams in Server Component.
acceptance_criteria: Given page render, when user clicks Skip, then skipOnboardingStep(orgId, 4) is called and navigation goes to /onboarding/5.
Given page render, when user clicks Create Product, then navigation goes to /3-technical/create?onboarding=true&return=/onboarding/5.
Given GET /onboarding/4?onboardingComplete=true, when page renders, then updateOnboardingState({current_step:5, completed_steps:[...,4]}) fires and redirect to /onboarding/5.
Given vitest+RTL covers above, when pnpm --filter web test runs, then 0 failures.
risk_red_lines: Do not navigate back to step 3 — only forward.
Do not silently complete on return without query-param confirmation.
